claims.summary: Low fill should shorten rest without collapsing the autonomous cadence.
claims.disposition: verify the 0.6 low-fill multiplier and 30-second lower bound

claims.summary: Peripheral resonance must not load an entire large creation or research file into the autonomous loop.
